title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that ad monetization is the superior model for AI tools over subscriptions, and identifies human trust rather than technology as the primary bottleneck for AI agent adoption. He discusses decision frameworks learned from competitive sailing for making high-stakes choices with incomplete information.
